title: Download more than 1 file at a time
excerpt:
I think the feature of being able to download files from multiple items at a time would be very beneficial. 
This would be very useful when downloading the Triggerly QR codes to print them out to stick to our items.

posts.author: frankie1004 (Frankie Woodburn)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think the feature of being able to download files from multiple items at a time would be very beneficial.
This would be very useful when downloading the Triggerly QR codes to print them out to stick to our items.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Frankie,

Our Advanced File Gallery app not only shows you all files added to items on the board, but also gives you an ability to categorize them and download all or selected files with one click. Maybe you could give it a try?

posts.author: zika56fery (zikafery)
posts.cookedHtml:
Frankie Woodburn:

I think the feature of being able to download files from multiple items at a time would be very beneficial.
This would be very useful when downloading the Triggerly QR codes to print them out to stick to our items. catsounds app

Many platforms currently only allow single-item downloads, which can be tedious when you have a large number of items to process. Implementing a “batch download” or “download all” feature for specific file types associated with multiple selected items would be a huge usability improvement.

posts.author: ChenS (Chen Scheuermann)
posts.cookedHtml: It will be great to ahve an option “download all” directly from the files column. It will not require open new view and filter
